data.title: VP Vance Slams Pro-Ukraine Protesters for Confronting Him With His Daughter: 'Chasing a Three-Year-Old for Politics'
data.description: Vice President Vance recently found himself confronted by a group of pro-Ukraine protestors while out with his young daughter in Ohio.

data.title: Mark Cuban Reveals the Thing He Respects Most About Elon Musk: 'What He's Been Able To Accomplish Is Insane, It's Incredible'
data.description: Last fall, Mark Cuban expressed his admiration for Elon Musk's business acumen and risk-taking approach, despite their ideological differences.

data.title: Hackers Expose Customer Data—Retail Pharmacy Giant Paying $6.8M in Compensation
data.description: Retail pharmacy giant Rite Aid has agreed to pay $6.8 million to its customers following a significant data breach.

data.title: Jim Cramer Asks, 'Do We Just Keep Selling Because Everyone Is Selling?'—Calls It The 'Every Day Lower Prices Walmart White House'
Iran Dismisses Trump's Nuclear Negotiation Proposal, Accuses US of Coercion
data.description: Iran's Supreme Leader has categorically rejected a peace negotiation proposal from President Trump, accusing the US of attempting to "bully" Iran into compliance.
